# Handle Types

Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/addBunApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, scriptPath: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.BunAppResource

Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsNodeServer(entryPoint: string, outputPath?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsPackageScript(scriptName?: string, runScriptArguments?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsStaticWebsite(apiPath?: string, apiTarget?: Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.IResourceWithServiceDiscovery, outputPath?: string, stripPrefix?: boolean, targetEndpointName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource

Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withBuildScript(scriptName: string, args?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
